d:
Passive. Temesia does not perform normal attacks. Instead, she selects the farthest enemy and charges towards them, dealing [[125%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies in her path. Upon reaching the target, she changes direction and restores [[180]] Energy. Temesia's attack animation speed is not affected by her ATK SPD or Haste. Each point of ATK SPD or Haste increases her charge damage by [[1%]].
Active. Temesia summons her mount Dawn to leap forward, dealing [[300%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies and knocking them down. Her charge speed will be increased by [[10%]] afterward, up to [[2]] stacks.
Increases damage dealt by Temesia's charge to [[130%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt by Temesia's charge to [[140%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt by Temesia's charge to [[150%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt by Temesia's charge to [[160%]]<ATK>.

Temesia commands her mount Dawn to kick an enemy while changing the charge direction, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage and inflicting an [[interruption effect]]. Reduces the enemy's damage dealt by [[15%]] for [[5]]s.
Restores [[10%]] of lost HP when changing the charge direction.
Increases damage to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[170%]]<ATK>.
Temesia wields her broadsword to attack adjacent enemies four times while charging, dealing damage that is equal to [[40%]] of the targets' ATK. Each damage doesn't exceed [[70%]] of her ATK.
Each damage is increased to [[45%]] of the targets' ATK.
Each damage is increased to [[50%]] of the targets' ATK.
Each damage is increased to [[60%]] of the targets' ATK.
Temesia increases her ATK by [[11%]] during battle. She also gains an extra [[2%]] ATK the first time she casts Knight's Heart.
Temesia increases her ATK by [[14%]] during battle. She also gains an extra [[3%]] ATK the first time she casts Knight's Heart.
Temesia increases her ATK by [[18%]] during battle. She also gains an extra [[4%]] ATK the first time she casts Knight's Heart.
Temesia permanently becomes [[unaffected]] after casting Knight's Heart [[2]] times, turning the charge damage into true damage.
Restores [[1%]] of her max HP per second under this status.
Restores [[1.2%]] of her max HP per second under this status.
Restores [[1.4%]] of her max HP per second under this status.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, when HP drops below [[60%]], reduces damage taken by [[15%]] and recovers [[3%]] of lost HP per second for [[8]]s. Triggers up to once every [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 15 Crit Resist, 10 Ranged DEF, 15 Crit DMG DEF.

d: Reduces the enemy's Phys DEF by [[1%]] when hit by Knight's Heart, up to [[6]] stacks.

Temesia takes [[30%]] less damage while charging. Her Iron Heel skill also deals extra damage equal to [[30%]] of the target's max HP while granting her a [[300%]]<ATK> shield. The extra damage cannot exceed [[600%]]<ATK>.
